missingSurface: The frozen backend truth exposes outcome truth, gate, settlement, scorecard, and assurance projections, but it does not publish one first-class UI-ready assurance bundle with consultation mode, medicines supplied, GP action posture, and dense evidence-row copy already composed for the same-shell staff workbench.
temporaryFallback: 361 derives the bounded assurance preview from 352/355 truth objects by composing OutcomeEvidenceEnvelope, NormalizedPharmacyOutcomeEvidence, PharmacyOutcomeMatchScorecard, PharmacyOutcomeReconciliationGate, PharmacyOutcomeSettlement, PharmacyOutcomeTruthProjection, and PharmacyAssuranceProjection into one deterministic preview adapter.
riskIfUnresolved: Later assurance and console surfaces could restate consultation mode, medicines supplied, or GP action posture inconsistently if they each remix the raw reconciliation records independently.
followUpAction: Publish a canonical backend-owned PharmacyOutcomeAssuranceBundle projection that freezes the same presentation-ready outcome-assurance fields currently composed in the preview adapter, then rebind 361 and later console views to that bundle.
